action_set_definitions.name: get_system_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the drone's current coordinates, battery level, and the site's structural integrity status.

action_set_definitions.name: get_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the items currently stored in the drone's inventory.

action_set_definitions.name: scan_cell
action_set_definitions.description: Examines a specific grid cell [x, y] to identify the terrain and any hidden artifact IDs. Does not consume site integrity.

action_set_definitions.name: move_to
action_set_definitions.description: Moves the drone to a new grid cell. Battery-intensive operation.

action_set_definitions.name: stabilize_site
action_set_definitions.description: Reinforces the site structure to increase the site_integrity value. Battery-intensive operation.

action_set_definitions.name: excavate
action_set_definitions.description: Extracts an artifact from the current cell. Consumes significant battery and reduces site_integrity.

state_description.grid_map: A 2D array representing the excavation site, where each cell contains properties like 'terrain_type', 'depth', 'is_scanned', and 'hidden_content_id'.
state_description.drone_location: The current [x, y] coordinates of the excavation drone/equipment.
state_description.battery_level: The current energy percentage of the equipment (0-100).
state_description.inventory: A list of artifact IDs successfully recovered from the site.
state_description.site_integrity: A value representing the stability of the excavation site; decreases with aggressive digging.
